One should hoard fruits, bulbs, roots and varieties of gems for
two years having secured them during the Sun's transit through
Scorpio, and then sell them to get a profit equal to their price.
^ znfer n^oii
One should buy saffron, conch shell, corals, glass and pearls
when the Sun is situated in Sign Sagittarius, and sell them in six
months. Then he would get double the amount invested.
fopyrngftRr n^n
When the Sun tenants Capricorn or Aquarius one wishing for
profit should bay and keep metallic (or iron) vessels and grains and
sell them after a month. He would then get double the amount
invested.
HTWpTCS TOTRtfe II
One should collect roots, fruits, bulbs, vessels and gems when
the Sun has entered Sign Pisces, and sell them after six months.
He would then get as much profit as he desires.
